subject: [SDC] Fix non ssl NodePort
commit_message:
[SDC] Fix non ssl NodePort

Use single NodePort when needTLS = true

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Change-Id: I094edc8069ace49fdaa0e3fb56796530b748c72e
Issue-ID: OOM-2957
